title: Rudrashtkam
desc: Shri Rudrashtakam is a Sanskrit composition in devotion of Rudra, composed by the Hindu Bhakti poet Tulsidas. Tulsidas composed this prayer in 15th century and created the magnum opus Ram Charit Manas.
